description: GitHub Copilot CLI — free GPT-4.1 tier. Cheap, fast, used liberally as worker AND judge.
notes: GPT-4.1 is free per Copilot subscription. Use this tier liberally for low-stakes work and as a judge / sanity-check helper. Hermes is allowed to invoke copilot directly (per hermes-no-frontier-spawn rule exception). --allow-all replaces the non-existent --dangerously-skip-permissions; it is equivalent to --allow-all-tools + --allow-all-paths + --allow-all-urls. Model name uses dot form `claude-haiku-4.5` — the dash form `claude-haiku-4-5` is rejected by the copilot CLI (verified 2026-05-11). Absolute invocation path set 2026-05-12 by Clawta after isolated lobster env could not resolve PATH binaries.
